items.title: Why CFRA Remains Bullish on Salesforce (CRM) Despite Target Cut
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the AI Stocks Gaining Attention on Wall Street. On September 4, CFRA analyst Angelo Zino lowered the price target on the stock to $300.00 (from $375.00) while maintaining a Strong Buy rating. Analysts at CFRA cut the price target to $300 from $375. However, they still see the stock as […]

items.title: Salesforce (CRM) Price Target Trimmed Amid Broader Software Weakness
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the Buzzing AI Stocks on Wall Street. On September 4, KeyBanc analyst Jackson Ader lowered the price target on the stock to $400.00 (from $440.00) while maintaining an Overweight rating. According to the firm, there is a persistently negative narrative surrounding the application software sector which also seems to be […]

items.title: Make-A-Wish and Salesforce Launch National Partnership to Grant Life-Changing Wishes for Children with Critical Illnesses
items.description: Make-A-Wish America today announced a national partnership with Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the world's #1 AI CRM, to bring hope and joy to children battling critical illnesses. As part of its support, Salesforce will serve as the official matching gift partner for Childhood Cancer Awareness Month (CCAM) this September, helping inspire additional donations that will make a meaningful impact in communities nationwide.
